title: Growth Energy, CFAA File New Opening Brief in Long-Stayed RVO Case
content: On Wednesday, November 20th, Growth Energy, along with Clean Fuels Alliance America, filed a new opening brief with the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuitâ€¯(Case No. 20-1046) challenging the Environmental Protection Agencyâ€™s (EPA) failure to fully account for small refinery exemptions (SREs) when issuing renewable volume obligations (RVO) under the Renewable Fuel Standard (RFS).
author: Analysts Account
